title: Madman Eva 222 Podcast with Grant McFarland Greenfield
display_title: Madman Eva 222 Podcast with Grant McFarland Greenfield
wikitext:
[]: Madman Eva 2.22 Podcast with Grant, McFarland, Greenfield             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Jun 16, 2011 8:35 am Podcast interview thing with Tiffany Grant, Mike McFarland and Matt Greenfield. Pretty good, I recommend taking a listen. Podcast Homepage

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 16, 2011 8:51 am Their page is kind of wonky. If you want to download the mp3, this is the proper link: http://www.madman.com.au/actions/podcasts.do?method=download&podcastItemId=140

[]:             Quote Post by Brainman » Thu Jun 16, 2011 5:42 pm I like that Tiffany Grant finally does reveal her hand a bit with a "hey, yeah, what's with that?" comment. Yeah praising the visuals is one thing, but you know what the inner sentiment is.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Jun 16, 2011 5:45 pm Brainman wrote: I like that Tiffany Grant finally does reveal her hand a bit with a "hey, yeah, what's with that?" comment. Yeah praising the visuals is one thing, but you know what the inner sentiment is.

[]:             Quote Post by Brainman » Thu Jun 16, 2011 5:48 pm gatotsu911 wrote: Do elaborate. You mean the bit with Greenfield and McFarland joking about how more explosions means less dubbing?
